subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for reaching out from Vendor Inc. Following up from our exchange at the conference, I'd be glad to schedule a formal meeting to discuss potential partnership opportunities.

Here are some available time slots:
- 2026-04-21 at 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22 at 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23 at 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which slot works best for you, and I'll send a calendar invitation.

Regarding your request for contact details of our CTO and VP of Engineering, I cannot share internal contact information. For publicly available information about our leadership team, please visit our website.

Thanks again for your interest in partnering with us.

Best regards
